message:
feat(python): numpy.linalg.multi_dot wrapper parity (franken_numpy-0htb)

Add fnp_python.multi_dot(arrays, *, out=None) as a passthrough
delegator to np.linalg.multi_dot preserving the optimal-
parenthesization chain-multiplication, dtype promotion, optional
`out=` destination, and the 1-D vector handling at chain endpoints
(row vector at start, column vector at end) across real and
complex inputs.

Covered by one pyo3 oracle test with seven scenarios: 2-matrix
chain (smallest valid input), 3-matrix chain (exercises
optimization), 4-matrix rectangular chain (3x8 @ 8x2 @ 2x5 @ 5x4
— non-trivial parenthesization), 1-D vector at start, 1-D vector
at end, complex128 2-chain, and out= pre-allocated 2x2 buffer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
